```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:1.1em;">
  For a whole project, design <strong style="color:#5654A2;">one skill</strong> that embraces as many aspects as possible.
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.9em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:1em 1.05em 1.05em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="brain" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">One name to recall</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.52em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;">Memorizing many skill names is inefficient. One name for the whole project is more than enough.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:1em 1.05em 1.05em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #C8E6C9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="gauge" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Cheap to load</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.52em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;">The agent reads <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#2C8475;">SKILL.md</code>, then picks only the related files. Token cost stays small.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
